resources.string: Jetpack Compose is a modern toolkit for building native Android UI. Compose simplifies and accelerates UI development on Android.

In this tutorial, you build a simple UI component with declarative functions. You call Compose functions to say what elements you want and the Compose compiler does the rest. Compose is built around Composable functions. These functions let you define your app's UI programmatically because they let you describe how it should look and provide data dependencies.
Displays text and follows the recommended Material Design guidelines.
Creates a composable that lays out and draws a given Painter class object.
A layout composable that places its children in a horizontal sequence.
A layout composable that places its children in a vertical sequence.
